name: cloum
description: Cloud Manager CLI — Kubernetes cluster connections for GCP, AWS, Azure with cloud sync and menu bar app
author: Sreeram

scripts.build:all: bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=dist/cloum-darwin-arm64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=dist/cloum-darwin-x64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile=dist/cloum-linux-x64 && bun build ./src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile=dist/cloum-windows-x64.exe
scripts.test: bun run src/index.ts list && bun run src/index.ts config --json && bun run src/index.ts sync --status
scripts.smoke: bun run src/index.ts --version && bun run src/index.ts list && bun run src/index.ts status && bun run src/index.ts config --json && bun run src/index.ts favorites && bun run src/index.ts --help | grep -q cloum
